components.value: V, S, DF V, S, DF

description.value: The subject becomes temporarily immune to poison. Any poison in its system or any poison to which it is exposed during the spell’s duration does not affect the subject until the spell’s duration has expired. Delay poison does not cure any damage that poison may have already done. Delay Poison, Communal This spell functions like delay poison, except you divide the duration in 1-hour intervals among the creatures touched.
